metadata.description: Curated skills for iOS dev, web dev, and AI agent workflows

plugins.name: ios-dev-toolkit
plugins.description: iOS/SwiftUI development skills: animation, audit, critique, polish, simulator nav, TestFlight deploy, AXe automation, and local staging

plugins.name: web-dev-toolkit
plugins.description: Web development skills: mobile workflows, Playwright test generation, and UI spec checking

plugins.name: ai-dev-toolkit
plugins.description: AI development skills: prompt evaluation, spec-driven tests, and token-efficient project setup

plugins.name: openclaw-config
plugins.description: Configure OpenClaw self-hosted AI gateway via Docker

plugins.name: harness-engineering-toolkit
plugins.description: Mechanical enforcement for Claude Code mandatory workflows: bootstrap harness systems, manage living docs, extend enforcement infrastructure, and troubleshoot issues

plugins.name: design-toolkit
plugins.description: Design suite: visual ideation moodboards, browser-driven illustration asset pipeline, design-spec audits against running apps, and Claude Design handoff (inbound + outbound)

plugins.name: workflow-toolkit
plugins.description: Repeatable engineering rituals: post-merge sync, live runbook walkthroughs for external/multi-step processes, and adversarial review cycles before merge

plugins.name: environment-toolkit
plugins.description: Cross-project environment maintenance: env health diagnostics (git/docker/Xcode/MCP) and MCP pruning by token cost and failure rate

plugins.name: image-gen-toolkit
plugins.description: Image generation prompting toolkit: workflow-aware ComfyUI prompt composition, model-family adaptation, LoRA catalog matching, and adversarial visual QA handoff
